Verified by setup_task.sh line 48: 'for i in $(seq -f "%03g" 1 10)' creates spam_001.eml through spam_010.eml (10 files)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves rescuing 5 legitimate emails (ham_046 through ham_050) from a Junk folder containing 10 actual spam emails. The emails come from the SpamAssassin public corpus, a well-known dataset for spam filtering research. The agent must create a folder named 'False-Positives', move only the 5 legitimate emails there, and draft an incident report to helpdesk-admin@techcorp.org. All metadata counts and email indices are accurately specified.
